creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text: I would like to re-open this PR as it seems this patch may be the one that broke relative paths in libmap.conf. They no longer work as of 11.2-RELEASE and this PR appears to be the reason. Anyone upgrading to 11.2-RELEASE with relative paths in their libmap.conf (as previously required) will have binaries that refuse to work due to "missing" libraries.
